'''Kothtri''' was a traditional type of spiced [[Fruit juice/Legends|fruit juice]] that originated on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]],<ref name="GCG" /> a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> The Bothans, who found the beverage enjoyable, used "Kothtri" as a first name for some [[Gender/Legends|female]] members.<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kothtri was first mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]]. The fruit juice was only described in a table of Bothan female names.<ref name="GCG" />
